query: How much are green chili prices trending this week?
ground_truth: Green chili prices have increased 15% this week due to supply shortage.
contexts: Green chili: Rs.4500/quintal (up from Rs.3900 last week).

query: How to grow ragi in red soil Karnataka?
ground_truth: Ragi thrives in red laterite soil. Sow in June-July, 30cm row spacing.
contexts: Ragi cultivation: suited for red soil, drought-tolerant, sow June-July.

query: What fertilizer schedule for sugarcane in Belgaum?
ground_truth: Apply 250kg N, 100kg P2O5, 120kg K2O per hectare in 3 splits.
contexts: Sugarcane fertilizer: 250-100-120 NPK/ha, split at planting, 45d, 90d.

query: Best tomato varieties for North Karnataka climate?
ground_truth: Arka Rakshak, Arka Samrat, and PKM-1 perform well in North Karnataka.
contexts: IIHR recommended varieties for North Karnataka: Arka Rakshak, Arka Samrat.

query: When is the right time to harvest arecanut?
ground_truth: Harvest arecanut 7-8 months after flowering when nuts turn yellow-orange.
contexts: Arecanut harvesting: 7-8 months post-flowering, yellow-orange color indicator.

query: How much water does mulberry crop need per week?
ground_truth: Mulberry needs 40-50mm water/week through drip or furrow irrigation.
contexts: Mulberry irrigation: 40-50mm/week, drip preferred for water efficiency.

query: What is intercropping pattern for coconut plantation?
ground_truth: Intercrop coconut with banana, cocoa, or black pepper for max returns.
contexts: Coconut intercropping: banana first 3 years, pepper/cocoa for long-term.

query: How to control tomato leaf curl virus?
ground_truth: Control whitefly vectors with neem oil or imidacloprid. Use resistant varieties.
contexts: Tomato leaf curl: transmitted by whiteflies, control with neem oil sprays.

query: My paddy has brown spots on leaves, what disease is this?
ground_truth: Likely brown spot disease. Apply mancozeb 75% WP at 2g/L water.
contexts: Brown spot in rice: caused by Bipolaris oryzae, treat with mancozeb.

query: Which biological control agents for brinjal shoot borer?
ground_truth: Release Trichogramma chilonis egg parasitoid (50,000/ha) at fruiting stage.
contexts: Brinjal shoot borer biocontrol: Trichogramma chilonis, 50,000 eggs/ha.

query: How to prevent fungal infection in stored grains?
ground_truth: Dry grains to below 12% moisture. Store in hermetic bags. Use neem leaves.
contexts: Grain storage: moisture below 12%, hermetic storage, neem leaf treatment.

query: Coconut rhinoceros beetle control methods?
ground_truth: Use rhinoceros beetle traps with Metarhizium anisopliae fungus bait.
contexts: Coconut rhinoceros beetle: Metarhizium-based traps, log removal near palms.

query: Safe pesticide for vegetables that I can spray and sell next day?
ground_truth: Use neem-based pesticides with 1-day PHI or Bt-based sprays for safe harvesting.
contexts: Low PHI pesticides: neem oil (1 day), Bacillus thuringiensis (0 days).

query: How to apply for PM-KISAN scheme?
ground_truth: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in with Aadhaar and land records.
contexts: PM-KISAN: Rs.6000/year, apply at pmkisan.gov.in with Aadhaar and land docs.

query: What subsidy is available for drip irrigation in Karnataka?
ground_truth: Karnataka offers 90% subsidy for SC/ST and 80% for others under PMKSY.
contexts: PMKSY drip subsidy: 90% for SC/ST, 80% general, max 5 hectares.

query: Is there crop insurance for rabi season crops?
ground_truth: Yes, PMFBY covers rabi crops. Premium is 1.5% for rabi, enroll before Dec 31.
contexts: PMFBY rabi: 1.5% premium, covers wheat/mustard/gram, deadline Dec 31.

query: How to get KCC loan for my farm?
ground_truth: Apply for KCC at any bank with land records. Interest rate is 4% with subvention.
contexts: KCC: apply at scheduled banks, 4% interest with subvention, max Rs.3 lakh.

query: Will it rain in Dharwad this week?
ground_truth: Light to moderate rainfall expected in Dharwad district this week.
contexts: IMD forecast: Dharwad - light rain Wednesday-Friday, 20-30mm expected.

query: When will monsoon arrive in Karnataka this year?
ground_truth: Southwest monsoon typically arrives in Karnataka coast by June 1-5.
contexts: IMD prediction: Southwest monsoon to hit Karnataka coast around June 3.

query: Is it safe to spray pesticide today considering weather?
ground_truth: Do not spray if rain is expected within 4 hours. Check forecast first.
contexts: Spray advisory: avoid spraying before rain, minimum 4h dry window needed.

query: What crops should I plant if monsoon is delayed?
ground_truth: Drought-resistant crops: ragi, jowar, sunflower for delayed monsoon areas.
contexts: Delayed monsoon crops: ragi, jowar, sunflower under 500mm rainfall.

query: Tomato bele yaavaga Kolar mandi alli?
Ragi bele yeshtu sarkaar fix maadide?
ground_truth: Ragi MSP Rs.3846/quintal sarkaar fix maadide (2025-26).
contexts: Government MSP for ragi: Rs.3846/quintal (2025-26 Kharif).

query: Tomato gida keyke hege niyantrisuvudu?
ground_truth: Belaichchi niyantrana: neem enne sidu mattu nirodhaka taligalu balasi.
contexts: Tomato pest control: neem oil spray, resistant varieties like Arka Rakshak.

query: PM-KISAN yojane ge hege arji maaduvudu?
ground_truth: PM-KISAN: pmkisan.gov.in nalli Aadhaar mattu bhumi daakalegal jote arji maadi.
contexts: PM-KISAN: apply online at pmkisan.gov.in with Aadhaar and land records.
